echoParts: but God meant it for good
verseText: As for you, you meant evil against me, but God meant it for good, to bring it about that many people should be kept alive...
meaning: Joseph's brothers had an evil plan to hurt Joseph. But God had a good plan the whole time, to use Joseph to save many people
